---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue you encountered
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📍 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happens instead.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or error messages to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

Please provide the following information:

- **OS**: [Windows/Linux/macOS] (specify version)
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.8.10]
- **Tool Version**: [e.g., 0.1]
- **Installation Method**: [Docker/pip/git clone]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Debugging Information

Please provide error logs or traceback if available:

```
[Paste error logs here]
```

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the README and documentation
- [ ] I am using the latest version
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have tried reinstalling dependencies
- [ ] This is an authorized penetration testing tool usage
